# ICD10AnalysisToolbox

ICD10AnalysisToolbox was written to streamline the analysis of tabular
ICD-10 data in long format:

- [`create_tte_icd()`](https://m-ingold.github.io/ICD10AnalysisToolbox/reference/create_tte_icd.md)
  adds history and event (yes/no), as well as time to event or contact
  loss for each ID for a set of ICD-10 codes of choice.
- [`time_to_event_phecode()`](https://m-ingold.github.io/ICD10AnalysisToolbox/reference/time_to_event_phecode.md)
  automatically runs
  [`create_tte_icd()`](https://m-ingold.github.io/ICD10AnalysisToolbox/reference/create_tte_icd.md)
  for all Phecodes mapping to ICD10 codes
- [`phewas_analysis_phecodes()`](https://m-ingold.github.io/ICD10AnalysisToolbox/reference/phewas_analysis_phecodes.md)
  runs Cox proportional hazard models for all available Phecode outcomes
  and visualises them as a PheWAS plot, like so:

![PheWAS
plot](articles/test_outcomes.png?raw=true "Simulated associations with hypertension")

PheWAS plot

## Installation

You can install the development version of ICD10AnalysisToolbox from
[GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r

# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("M-Ingold/ICD10AnalysisToolbox")
```

## Example

Add on outcome consisting of multiple ICD-10 codes to an existing
dataframe, e.g. subtypes of Myocardial infarction:

``` r

cohort_table <- create_tte_icd(cohort_table, icd_table_long, tbl_mortality_contact_loss,
                               icd_codes = c("I21.0", "I21.1", "I21.2", "I21.3"), variable_name = "STEMI")
cohort_table <- create_tte_icd(cohort_table, icd_table_long, tbl_mortality_contact_loss,
                               icd_codes = c("I21.4"), variable_name = "NSTEMI")
```

## Available ICD-10 mappings

- \[Phecode map v1.2\]
  (<https://phewascatalog.org/phewas/_w_7b1256e92bb84559bf1c493fd51cf540/data/Phecode_map_v1_2_icd9_icd10cm.csv.zip>)
- \[Clinical Classifications Software Refined (CCSR,Fiscal Year 2025
  version)\] (<https://hcup-us.ahrq.gov/toolssoftware/ccsr/dxccsr.jsp>)

# Package index

## All functions

- [`DXCCSR`](https://m-ingold.github.io/ICD10AnalysisToolbox/reference/DXCCSR.md)
  : ICD-10-CM to Clinical Classifications Software Refined (CCSR)
  mapping
- [`create_tte_icd()`](https://m-ingold.github.io/ICD10AnalysisToolbox/reference/create_tte_icd.md)
  : Convert temporal ICD-10 codes into usable information for Cox
  regression
- [`fast_glm2()`](https://m-ingold.github.io/ICD10AnalysisToolbox/reference/fast_glm2.md)
  : Run many regression models quickly, for many response variables.
- [`phecodes`](https://m-ingold.github.io/ICD10AnalysisToolbox/reference/phecodes.md)
  : ICD-10-CM to PheCode mapping
- [`phewas_analysis_CCSR()`](https://m-ingold.github.io/ICD10AnalysisToolbox/reference/phewas_analysis_CCSR.md)
  : Determine the association of a variable of interest by running Cox
  regression on time to event information and logistic regression on
  prevalence at baseline. Generates PheWAS plots to assess the strenth
  of associations
- [`phewas_analysis_phecodes()`](https://m-ingold.github.io/ICD10AnalysisToolbox/reference/phewas_analysis_phecodes.md)
  : Determine the association of a variable of interest by running Cox
  regression on time to event information and logistic regression on
  prevalence at baseline. Generates PheWAS plots to assess the strenth
  of associations
- [`time_to_event_CCSR()`](https://m-ingold.github.io/ICD10AnalysisToolbox/reference/time_to_event_CCSR.md)
  : Map temporal ICD-10 codes into outcomes for Cox regression using the
  CCSR convention
- [`time_to_event_phecode()`](https://m-ingold.github.io/ICD10AnalysisToolbox/reference/time_to_event_phecode.md)
  : Map temporal ICD-10 codes into outcomes for Cox regression using the
  phecode convention
